template:
defmodule Solution do
  def flatten_with_depth(list) do
    flatten_helper(list, 0)
  end

  defp flatten_helper([], _depth), do: []
  
  defp flatten_helper([head | tail], depth) when [[SLOT list_guard]] do
    flatten_helper(head, [[SLOT depth_step]]) ++ flatten_helper(tail, depth)
  end
  
  defp flatten_helper([head | tail], depth) do
    [[[SLOT leaf_pair]] | flatten_helper(tail, depth)]
  end
end
prompt: Pick the list guard, the depth step, and the leaf-pair tuple.
